title: Volmur Textures
description: A resource that shows the perfect minecraft in my opinion
body:
![Banner_for_volmur](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6370356ba6ccfcb2843cf1cdae09737efd3ddd7d_0.webp)
### VolmurVanilla The resource pack updates various items for the author's own game and makes some textures and shades more logical, for example with diamond items - Why diamond has one palette and diamond armour and tools have a different palette? ![updates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9174217b2ff0947b3e25fb9ab5ee91f2cab5b75d_0.webp) ### What's currently done in the resource pack? Right now, the following is finished: armor, tools, weapons, and some minor items. In the future, I'm planning to retexture the food, all the tools, and the potion bottles! ### Community Join [our Discord Server](https://discord.gg/Ue5SMdrhtP) to ask questions, suggest your ideas, or just chat with the community!
